Comment.value: This script transfers value for IO contexts to the new access rights, developed in March 2025. IO contexts: "current_group_member" -> "My Group" "group" -> "My Group" "member" -> "My member"

Gå igenom alla IOs i en titel För varje IO: Nolla access rights i IO:n Kolla IO Value - skapa upp Read filter och Write as enligt ovan Kolla blocket om det är write eller read (input eller output) Om det är Post output - kolla även write field där. Klick i access right i IO:n baserat på findings i punkten ovan.
Score is not visible through IO values
Search for IOs that are connected as a value to a list item

LayoutReference.name: TABLE FAT IO Value @ Page item

Comment.value: Find all IO Values using this IO

Calculation.Text: FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Context

Comment.value: Some contexts are still set by a modifier value, IO Rate Output v2 for example

Calculation.Text: Case( PatternCount(List(FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value); "current"); "current_group_members"; PatternCount(List(FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value); "member"); "member"; PatternCount(List(FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value); "group"); "group"; PatternCount(List(FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value); "session"); "session" )

Comment.value: IO function "Write" if any field mode = "Write", "Read" if no field = "Write" and any field mode "Read"

Calculation.Text: Case( PatternCount(List ( FAT IO Field Value @ IO Value PI::Field mode ); "Write"); "Write" ; "Read" )
$io_context = "group" Or PatternCount ( $io_context ; "current" ) // current group memnbers can be spelled differently
$io_context = "group" Or PatternCount ( $io_context ; "current" ) // current group memnbers can be spelled differently

Comment.value: Session writes as group for a reason I do not understand

Calculation.Text: Not isValidFAT4IOcontext( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Read filter )
Not isValidFAT4IOcontext( FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Write as )

LayoutReference.name: TABLE FAT IO Value @ Page item

Comment.value: Score is invisible in the IO value interface
Find all Text variables using this IO
Translate the legacy context to a new context

Calculation.Text: Case ( FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Member"; "Member"; FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Group" Or FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Current group members"; "Group"; FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Session" ; "Session"; FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Auto" ; "" )

Case ( FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Member"; "My Member"; FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Group" Or FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Current group members"; "My Group"; FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Session" ; "My Session"; FAT Text variable::IO Context legacy = "Auto" ; "My Member¶My Group" )

Comment.value: Find all Dynamic lists using this IO
